member.name: Luke Pollard
member.role: MP for Plymouth Sutton and Devonport
member.synopsis: Luke Pollard is the Labour (Co-op) MP for Plymouth Sutton and Devonport , and has been an MP continually since 8 June 2017. He currently holds the Government post of Minister of State (Ministry of Defence).

officialSourceNotes: Current member identity, party, constituency, thumbnail, contact information, synopsis, written questions, and registered interests are generated from the official UK Parliament Members API.
Recent Commons division positions are generated from the official UK Parliament Commons Votes API.
External official links are retained as citations; TOR Phi profile and record navigation remains internal.

writtenQuestions.heading: Frigates: Exports
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Defence, how much his Department has received in payments for the export of the Type (a) 26 and (b) 31 frigate design since the project began.
writtenQuestions.answerText: I am unable to answer due to commercial sensitivities.

writtenQuestions.heading: Frigates: Exports
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Defence, whether his Department receives a payment for each export order of Type (a) 26 and (b) 31 frigate.
writtenQuestions.answerText: I am unable to answer due to commercial sensitivities.

writtenQuestions.heading: RM Chivenor: Repairs and Maintenance
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Defence, how many callouts have been made to RM Chivenor for maintenance issues relating to (a) roofing, (b) loss of heating and hot water, (c) electrics, (d) pest control and (e) damp and mould since April 2022.
writtenQuestions.answerText: It has not proved possible to respond to the hon. Member in the time available before prorogation.

writtenQuestions.heading: Portsmouth Dockyard
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Defence, how many service personnel are based at HMNB Portsmouth as of May 2024.
writtenQuestions.answerText: As of 1 January 2024, there were 5,760 personnel based at HMNB Portsmouth. Due to the method used to capture personnel data, this is the most current available figure.

writtenQuestions.heading: Armed Forces: Housing
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Defence, what assessment he has made of the adequacy of his Department's progress on improving service accommodation since his appointment.
writtenQuestions.answerText: It has not proved possible to respond to the hon. Member in the time available before Prorogation.

writtenQuestions.heading: Clyde Naval Base
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Defence, how many service personnel are based at HMNB Clyde.
writtenQuestions.answerText: These figures are reported annually and are accurate as of 01 January 2024. Figures have been rounded to the nearest 10 to prevent inadvertent disclosure, and numbers ending in "5" have been rounded to the nearest 20 to prevent systematic bias. University...
